title: Public Relations Specialists
description: Promote or create an intended public image for individuals, groups, or organizations. May write or select material for release to various communications media. May specialize in using social media.

tasks.text: Respond to requests for information from the media or designate an appropriate spokesperson or information source.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan or direct development or communication of programs to maintain favorable public or stockholder perceptions of an organization's accomplishments, agenda, or environmental responsibility.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Post and update content on the company's Web site and social media outlets.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Write press releases or other media communications to promote clients.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Establish or maintain cooperative relationships with representatives of community, consumer, employee, or public interest groups.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other managers to identify trends or key group interests or concerns or to provide advice on business decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coach client representatives in effective communication with the public or with employees.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study the objectives, promotional policies, or needs of organizations to develop public relations strategies that will influence public opinion or promote ideas, products, or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or edit organizational publications, such as employee newsletters or stockholders' reports, for internal or external audiences.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Arrange public appearances, lectures, contests, or exhibits for clients to increase product or service awareness or to promote goodwill.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Plan or conduct market or public opinion research to test products or determine potential for product success, communicating results to client or management.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop plans or materials to communicate organizational activities that are beneficial to the environment, public safety, or other important social issues.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with production or support personnel to produce or coordinate production of advertisements or promotions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with advertising agencies or staff to arrange promotional campaigns in all types of media for products, organizations, or individuals.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare or deliver speeches to further public relations objectives.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate public responses to environmental management incidents or conflicts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop marketing campaigns for environmental technologies or services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Purchase advertising space or time as required to promote client's product or agenda.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
